title: Shellcheck fixes
body:
Fixes for https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1701373.

Ran locally with `shellcheck -a`.

Tested the updated script locally and it continues working as before.

@rhatdan @mtrmac PTAL

comments.body:
```
Failed to download metadata for repo 'updates'
Error: Failed to download metadata for repo 'updates'
```
... will try again later

@rhatdan, we need similar fixes for the other projects as well. Especially the changes in https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/713/commits/b31f0da5c6327b6ab75a03cbecef7701fbae76bd are required to support `podman --root /path [TAB]` (note that no completions occur any more).

> @rhatdan, we need similar fixes for the other projects as well. Especially the changes in [b31f0da](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/commit/b31f0da5c6327b6ab75a03cbecef7701fbae76bd) are required to support `podman --root /path [TAB]` (note that no completions occur any more).

FYI @baude @mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat

> The more I look at this, the more incorrect logic I find…

Same here :see_no_evil: 

> Maybe it would be better, after all, to keep the scope of this PR to only shellcheck fixes, and not try to improve the logic on `--option param`? I.e. go back to your original idea of just giving up on `main_options_with_args_glob`.

I prefer the current version of the previous one. The logic can be tricked into reporting bogus but at least it's reporting something.

LGTM, let’s get this in.

(For future reference, if anyone finds this PR to see what the commits were about:

`/usr/share/bash-completion/completions/pkg-config` could be a good starting point: `_init_completion -s` to handle `--option=param` and `--option param` uniformly, a simple `case` to add completions for individual options — and even an automated way to extract available options out of `--help`. It would probably need fair amount of tweaking (to handle the individual subcommands), but it seems much closer to being actually correct.)
